options.query: | mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as c WHERE index=cisco_mdt BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as label | eval value=label | fields label value | sort label

| mstats latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx") as "EAPOL Rx" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-tx") as "EAPOL Tx" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx-start") as "Rx Start" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx-logoff") as "Rx Logoff" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx-resp-id") as "Rx Resp-ID" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx-resp") as "Rx Response" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx-invalid") as "Rx Invalid" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.cts-env-data.device-sgt") as "Device SGT" latest("cisco.content.cts-env-data.life-time") as "Lifetime" latest("cisco.content.cts-env-data.total-num-servers") as "Total Servers" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.cts-env-data.status_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as Status | fields Switch Status] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.cts-env-data.last-updated-time_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Last Updated" | fields Switch "Last Updated"] | stats values("Device SGT") as "Device SGT" values(Lifetime) as Lifetime values("Total Servers") as Servers values(Status) as Status values("Last Updated") as "Last Updated" BY Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.access-control-list-type_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "ACL Type" | table Switch "ACL Type" | sort Switch "ACL Type"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.access-list-entries.access-list-entry.access-list-entries-oper-data.match-counter") as "Match Count" latest("cisco.content.access-list-entries.access-list-entry.rule-name") as "Rule #" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch -"Match Count"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.rx-badtag-pkts") as "Rx Bad Tag" latest("cisco.content.rx-nosci-pkts") as "Rx No SCI" latest("cisco.content.tx-encrypted-pkts") as "Tx Encrypted" latest("cisco.content.tx-protected-pkts") as "Tx Protected" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.mkpdu-stats-rx") as "MKPDU Rx" latest("cisco.content.mkpdu-stats-rx-distcak") as "Rx DistCAK" latest("cisco.content.mkpdu-stats-tx-distcak") as "Tx DistCAK" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.tcam-entries-used") as "TCAM Used" latest("cisco.content.tcam-entries-max") as "TCAM Max" latest("cisco.content.hash-entries-used") as "Hash Used" latest("cisco.content.hash-entries-max") as "Hash Max" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-tcam-oper*" cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | eval "TCAM %"=round('TCAM Used'/'TCAM Max'*100, 1) | eval "Hash %"=round('Hash Used'/'Hash Max'*100, 1) | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | table Switch "TCAM Used" "TCAM Max" "TCAM %" "Hash Used" "Hash Max" "Hash %" | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.keys.name_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-tcam-oper*" cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "TCAM Table" | table Switch "TCAM Table" | sort Switch "TCAM Table"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.instance-list.table-data.resource-usage.percentage-used") as "Used %" latest("cisco.content.instance-list.table-data.resource-usage.entries-used") as "Entries Used" latest("cisco.content.instance-list.table-data.resource-usage.max-entries") as "Max Entries" latest("cisco.content.instance-list.table-data.resource-usage.total-entries-free") as Free WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch -"Used %"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.shared-ftr-list.ftr-info.feature_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as Feature | table Switch Feature | sort Switch Feature

title: Cisco IOS XE — Security
description: 802.1X, TrustSec, ACLs, MACsec, MKA, TCAM, Dataplane Resources
